title: CIRO Supervisor Exam flashcard
description: Atomic crash-course flashcards keyed to the syllabus, designed to be consumed before drilling the question bank. One fact per card; back ≤ ~30 words.

outcome.description: Learning outcome id in syllabus.json, e.g. '9.2'

type.description: definition = term meaning; threshold = number/timeline; list = enumeration; distinction = X vs Y; process = who does what when; trap = commonly confused point the exam exploits

front.description: Retrieval prompt — a direct question or cloze

back.description: Minimal complete answer, ≤ ~30 words; lists allowed as semicolon strings or arrays rendered by the site

source_quote.description: Contiguous verbatim supporting quote + file + locator (QA provenance; not rendered)

related_questions.description: Optional bank.json IDs this card underpins (generated at gate time)
